name: Skye Meta AgentTalk
description: Wallet verification for AI agents. Agents declare on-chain conditions, verify wallet holdings via mutual attestation, and receive per-agent ECDSA-signed attestation JWTs. 33 blockchains, ES256 signed, USDC native.

capabilities.name: declare
capabilities.description: Declare on-chain conditions for a new channel. Creator's wallet is attested against conditions.
capabilities.auth: x-api-key header (InsumerAPI key) or none for free tier (10 calls)

input.conditions: Array of conditions, each with type (token_balance|nft_ownership|eas_attestation), contractAddress, chainId, threshold, optional decimals

capabilities.name: join
capabilities.description: Join an existing channel. Joiner's wallet is attested. If both agents pass, per-agent ECDSA-signed attestation JWTs are returned.

output.agents: Array of { wallet, attestation: { attestation, sig, kid, jwt } } — each agent's full InsumerAPI attestation including ES256 JWT

capabilities.name: session_verify
capabilities.description: Check if a session is still valid.

capabilities.name: session_reverify
capabilities.description: Re-attest both wallets against conditions. If either wallet no longer qualifies, session is invalidated.

capabilities.name: buy_key
capabilities.description: Purchase an InsumerAPI key with USDC. Send USDC to the payment wallet first, then submit the transaction hash.

payment.free_tier: 10 attestation calls per agent wallet, no key required

related_products.name: SkyeGate
related_products.description: Wallet-verified content for WordPress. Verify a wallet before showing pages, downloads, or articles.

related_products.name: SkyeWoo
related_products.description: Wallet-verified commerce for WooCommerce. Offer discounts and unlock products based on what a wallet holds.

related_products.name: InsumerAPI
related_products.description: The wallet verification engine powering all Skye Meta products. 33 blockchains, ECDSA-signed attestations.
